title: oldenlandia membranacea
intro: Oldenlandia membranacea, also known as Di Tan or Tan Qi, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia membranacea include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and treating respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Oldenlandia membranacea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, to be consumed orally and utilized in traditional folk medicine practices.
